entities.name: SOIL ORGANIC MATTER
entities.description: A vital reservoir of nutrients and energy for soil microorganisms, impacting soil's physical, chemical, and biological health

entities.name: SOIL ORGANIC CARBON
entities.description: A key component of soil organic matter essential for soil fertility and climate change mitigation

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: The ability of soil to sustain plant growth, influenced by organic matter and nutrient cycling

entities.name: NUTRIENT CYCLING
entities.description: The movement and exchange of organic and inorganic matter back into the production of living matter

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE MITIGATION
entities.description: Efforts to reduce or prevent emission of greenhouse gases

entities.name: SOIL MICROORGANISMS
entities.description: Biological entities in the soil that utilize organic matter for energy and nutrients

entities.name: PARTICULATE ORGANIC CARBON
entities.description: A fraction of soil organic carbon consisting of relatively large particles

entities.name: DISSOLVED ORGANIC CARBON
entities.description: A fraction of soil organic carbon that is soluble in water

entities.name: MICROBIAL BIOMASS CARBON
entities.description: The carbon contained within the living microbial biomass of the soil

entities.name: MINERAL-ASSOCIATED ORGANIC CARBON
entities.description: Organic carbon that is chemically bonded to soil minerals

entities.name: CARBON FARMING
entities.description: Agricultural practices aimed at increasing carbon sequestration in soil

entities.name: NUTRIENT DYNAMICS
entities.description: The processes governing the availability and movement of nutrients in the soil

entities.name: CARBON SEQUESTRATION
entities.description: The process of capturing and storing atmospheric carbon dioxide in the soil

entities.name: GREENHOUSE GASES
entities.description: Atmospheric gases that trap heat, contributing to climate change

entities.name: GLOBAL CARBON BALANCE
entities.description: The equilibrium between carbon sources and sinks on a global scale

entities.name: REGENERATIVE AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Farming and grazing practices that restore soil health and sequester carbon

entities.name: CSIFRA PROJECT
entities.description: A specific research project focused on soil and carbon

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics

entities.name: LABORATORY SAFETY GUIDELINES
entities.description: Protocols for safe chemical handling, waste management, and equipment maintenance

entities.name: CHEMICAL HANDLING
entities.description: The safe process of managing and using chemicals in a laboratory

entities.name: WASTE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The process of disposing of laboratory waste safely

entities.name: EQUIPMENT MAINTENANCE
entities.description: The regular upkeep of laboratory equipment to ensure analytical accuracy

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE SOIL MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Practices aimed at maintaining soil health and productivity over the long term

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns
